title: Shinji is exposed to several attractive women in Eva
display_title: Shinji is exposed to several attractive women in Eva
wikitext:
[]: Shinji is exposed to several attractive women in Eva...             Quote Post by Leighton » Sat Feb 19, 2011 8:24 am So why does he save it for the beginning EoE scene? I mean if he was keen enough to jerk off to Asuka in EoE, why didn't he take all those other opportunities. He rejects Misato's invitation, and rejects or doesn't react very well to Asuka's. Is it just an indication of his lack of social skills? I'm really hoping he gets it on with Asuka (or Rei considering the near 3rd Impact incident) in Rebuild haha.

[]:             Quote Post by BiQ » Sat Feb 19, 2011 8:26 am Because he's deathly afraid of human contact even if it's the one thing that would actually be good for him.

[]:             Quote Post by Leighton » Sat Feb 19, 2011 8:32 am BiQ wrote: Because he's deathly afraid of human contact even if it's the one thing that would actually be good for him.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sat Feb 19, 2011 8:42 am Yes, Shinji is indeed exposed to attractive females, starting in episode 2 , and then again in episode 13. They never seem impressed by what they see. Shinji himself exhibits somnophile tendencies, starting with episode 9 -- he would probably be happier (though he would layer that heavily with self-loathing) with an Asuka real-doll than anything else.

[]:             Quote Post by BiQ » Sat Feb 19, 2011 8:42 am There are people on this board who would say that EoE!Shinji is a very irrational character if he's supposed to be the guy we got to know during the TV series. I will only say that he was a completely broken shell of a human being who is at the end of his rope at that point. Clutching at any possible way to make his pain go away, even the ones that will obviously hurt him even more afterwards.

[]:             Quote Post by BornIn1142 » Sat Feb 19, 2011 8:44 am Leighton wrote: Hm but it seems a bit irrational, considering the scene in EoE. Unless he did it in front of Asuka so he wouldn't have to make contact with her - i guess i could understand that.

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Sat Feb 19, 2011 8:50 am BornIn1142 wrote: What I wonder is whether he masturbates regularly or not. I could see it either way.

[]:             Quote Post by Leighton » Sat Feb 19, 2011 8:57 am Hmm, yea i guess the Shinji in the series is just socially lacking, i dont know what he's completely thinking or hoping for in terms of relationships in EoE though. This conclusion from Mr. Tines makes sense though: Shinji himself exhibits somnophile tendencies, starting with episode 9 -- he would probably be happier (though he would layer that heavily with self-loathing) with an Asuka real-doll than anything else.

[]:             Quote Post by BornIn1142 » Sat Feb 19, 2011 9:05 am FreakyFilmFan4ever wrote: I'm pretty sure if the viewers were supposed to care about that, the series would have clued us in on it at some point.

[]:             Quote Post by SaltyJoe » Sat Feb 19, 2011 9:13 am Leighton wrote: Hmm, yea i guess the Shinji in the series is just socially lacking, i dont know what he's completely thinking or hoping for in terms of relationships in EoE though.

[]:             Quote Post by Ritsuko » Sat Feb 19, 2011 9:25 am I do believe Shinji masturbates more than average out of frustration also. If he didn't have that social barrier I bet he would have had sex with Misato.

[]:             Quote Post by BornIn1142 » Sat Feb 19, 2011 9:45 am Ritsuko wrote: I do believe Shinji masturbates more than average out of frustration also. If he didn't have that social barrier I bet he would have had sex with Misato.
